faq.question: Is this a genuine, authorized product?
faq.answer: Yes. Pakistan Detectors Technology is an authorized distributor, and every unit we sell — including this one — is genuine factory stock backed by a valid international manufacturer warranty.

faq.question: What is the warranty and how do I claim it?
faq.answer: This product carries a manufacturer warranty (typically 2–3 years depending on brand and model). If you experience an issue, contact us via WhatsApp or phone with your order details and we'll coordinate the claim directly with the manufacturer's regional service center.

faq.question: Do you deliver across Pakistan, and how long does it take?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer nationwide insured delivery. Orders within major cities typically arrive in 2–4 business days; remote areas may take slightly longer. You'll receive tracking details once your order ships.

faq.question: Is training included, and how does it work?
faq.answer: Yes, every purchase includes a free product training session — either in person at our Islamabad office or over a video call — covering setup, ground balancing, and field operation specific to your terrain.

deephunter-3d-pro.tagline: An advanced 3D underground-imaging metal detector that delivers deep treasure and cavity detection, precise single-coin identification, and dual search systems with four search coils for professional treasure hunting.
overviewParagraphs: The Nokta Deephunter 3D Pro is the world's first metal detector to combine deep treasure detection, underground cavity detection, and single-coin identification in one powerful, professional unit. It gives treasure hunters the flexibility of two advanced search systems built into a single device.

Engineered for shallow, mid-range, and deep searching, the Deephunter 3D Pro delivers precise target analysis through advanced 3D graphics, depth readings, metal-type identification, and strong discrimination. Whether you're searching for treasures, cavities, caves, tunnels, coins, or gold nuggets, the system delivers speed, depth, and professional control.

Switch between two search modes at the press of a button: a powerful static deep-search mode for locating precious-metal treasures and underground cavities with full-color 3D image analysis, or an ultra-fast mode for detecting single targets and gold nuggets at exceptional depth with full discrimination and audio tone identification.

jeohunter-3d-dual-system.tagline: An advanced 3D underground-imaging metal detector delivering deep metal detection, cavity detection, and precise target discrimination, supplied with three search coils for professional treasure hunting.
overviewParagraphs: The Nokta Jeohunter 3D Dual System is engineered and built with the latest technology, making it one of the most advanced devices in the world for locating precious metals and detecting hidden cavities. This deep-penetrating detector classifies targets into four groups: gold, non-ferrous metals, steel, and iron.

Alongside precise detection and metal-object analysis, the Jeohunter 3D Dual System can also detect underground cavities such as caves, cellars, tunnels, shelters, and tombs in real time, using an advanced graphic imaging system that plots 3D graphics of detected targets to help you understand a buried target before you dig.

The system delivers exceptional depth along with accurate target-size analysis and depth readings in centimeters for both metal objects and cavities. Whether you're searching heavily mineralized soil or working in tight spaces, the Jeohunter 3D Dual System offers a practical, professional solution for recovering both deep and shallow targets.

nokta-invenio-pro.tagline: A revolutionary AI-powered smart detector and imaging system with 3D target imaging, cavity detection, IPTU sensor technology, and unmatched analysis for deep treasure hunting.
overviewParagraphs: The Nokta Invenio Pro is a genuine first for the metal detecting industry — the world's first AI-powered smart detector and imaging system, engineered by Nokta Makro to achieve what traditional detectors could not for decades: real, comprehensive insight into what lies underground before you dig.

Powered by artificial intelligence, 3D imaging, target-shape analysis, depth determination, and cavity detection, the Invenio Pro helps treasure hunters find deeper targets, understand target type, estimate target dimensions, and identify underground anomalies with unprecedented clarity.

With 5, 14, and 20 kHz frequencies, 6 search modes, an IPTU sensor, and a 7-inch color TFT screen, the Invenio Pro delivers unmatched performance for detecting deep treasures, hideouts, and archaeological artifacts.

anfibio-multi.tagline: The Nokta Anfibio Multi is a rugged, multi-frequency metal detector built for coins, relics, jewelry, and gold. Operating at 5, 14, and 20 kHz with 9 search modes, a fully waterproof design, and included 2.4 GHz wireless headphones, it delivers fast target response both on land and underwater.

Fully submersible to 5 meters (16.4 ft), equipped with 2.4 GHz wireless headphones, and built with intuitive controls, the Anfibio Multi gives you the confidence to search challenging terrain on land or underwater, with excellent response speed and enhanced depth.

vanquish-540.tagline: An intelligent all-terrain metal detector powered by Multi-IQ technology, featuring 5 search modes, adjustable Iron Bias, 25 discrimination segments, Bluetooth wireless audio, and a waterproof V12 search coil.

Its waterproof 12x9-inch V12 coil helps you cover more ground quickly, while the red LED backlight and Bluetooth wireless audio support keep detecting comfortable as conditions change. The Vanquish 540 combines speed, depth, and smart target handling in one practical machine, suited to serious treasure hunters.

equinox-700.tagline: An advanced all-terrain metal detector built on Multi-IQ technology, offering 3 search modes, 4 single frequencies, low-latency wireless audio, a comfortable carbon-fiber shaft, and IP68 waterproof performance.
overviewParagraphs: Equinox 700 is built for speed, precision, and smooth performance in the real detecting world. Its fast response, accurate target identification, and rapid recovery speed help you work confidently in busy, high-trash ground where slower machines can miss valuable finds. Powered by Minelab's proven Multi-IQ technology, it operates across multiple frequencies at once so you get strong, dependable results across a wide range of conditions.

Truly built for all terrains, the Equinox 700 is ready for parks, fields, and beach environments without demanding complicated operation. Its three search modes each include two profiles, giving you an effective setup that adapts quickly as your location changes. And when you want finer control, the four single frequencies let you refine your search and stay focused on the targets that matter most.

It also includes automatic and continuous-automatic noise cancel, manual and tracking ground balance, low-latency wireless audio, a monochrome display with red backlight, and a light, comfortable build. With IP68 waterproof protection to 5 meters, the Equinox 700 is ready for wet conditions, mineralized ground, and long detecting sessions wherever your search takes you.

manticore.tagline: A high-performance metal detector powered by Multi-IQ+ technology, featuring a 2D target ID map, 10 search modes, fast target recovery, and IP68 waterproof protection to 5 meters — engineered for professional all-terrain performance.
overviewParagraphs: Detect Deeper. Identify with Greater Accuracy. Dig Faster.

The Minelab Manticore with Multi-IQ+ technology is the fastest, most powerful, and most accurate metal detector Minelab has ever built. Multi-IQ+ pushes more power through the coil across a wider frequency range, helping you reveal more targets in the ground. With advanced signal processing, sharper accuracy, and faster target recovery, the Manticore sets a new standard for serious treasure hunters.

go-find-22.tagline: A step up from the entry-level Go Find 11, the Minelab Go Find 22 adds two-tone audio discrimination in a lightweight, foldable body — an accessible choice for families and beginners who want clearer target feedback without added complexity.
overviewParagraphs: The Minelab Go Find 22 is a lightweight, easy-to-use metal detector built for newcomers who want to get started in the hobby without complication. Its V-FLEX dual-microcontroller circuitry and four visual discrimination icons let users identify the likely target type at a glance before digging.

A light, foldable shaft makes the detector easy to carry and store wherever you go — gardens, beaches, or campsites. Automatic Easy-Trak ground balancing adjusts the detector to the soil automatically, while two distinct audio tones help you quickly tell iron apart from coins and other precious-metal targets.

Compared to its sibling, the Go Find 11, the Go Find 22 adds a second audio tone — a low tone for iron and a high tone for coins and precious metals — so users can sort promising targets from junk by ear alone, without needing to check the display. Combined with V-FLEX's automatic ground sensing and noise reduction, it performs reliably across gardens, beaches, and parks.

go-find-44.tagline: The Minelab Go Find 44 steps up the Go Find family with a third search mode, Pinpoint targeting, a larger 10-inch coil, and free Bluetooth connectivity to the GO-FIND app — built for serious beginners who want more precision without moving to a professional-grade machine.
overviewParagraphs: The Minelab Go Find 44 is the most advanced mid-tier model in the Go Find range, designed for users who want more performance than the Go Find 11 or 22 without the complexity of a professional detector. It combines ease of use with added precision in a single lightweight, foldable unit.

Go Find 44 adds a third search mode dedicated to jewelry and coins, a Pinpoint mode for accurately locating targets before digging, and a larger 10-inch coil for wider ground coverage per sweep. It also adds Bluetooth 4.0 and the free GO-FIND app, which enables wireless listening, coin identification, and logging finds on Google Maps.

Treasure View technology, with 5 LED indicators, lights up red for iron and nails and green for coins and jewelry, giving an instant visual read on target type before digging — useful in gardens, beaches, or open fields. The whole unit weighs just 1.06 kg.

vanquish-540-pro-pack.tagline: The flagship Vanquish 540 Pro Pack pairs Minelab's simultaneous multi-frequency Multi-IQ technology with two waterproof coils, wireless ML80 headphones, and adjustable iron bias — a complete, ready-to-search bundle for serious coin, relic, and jewelry hunters.
overviewParagraphs: The Minelab Vanquish 540 Pro Pack is the top model in the Vanquish range, built for the serious detectorist who wants full control over their search from the very first outing. It runs on Minelab's Multi-IQ technology, which processes multiple frequencies simultaneously, combining the strength of several detectors in one machine that adjusts automatically without manual frequency selection.

The professional pack includes two waterproof coils: the 12×9-inch V12 for maximum depth and wide coverage, and the compact 8×5-inch V8 for precision in tight spaces and trash-heavy sites. It also includes wireless ML80 Bluetooth headphones for a cable-free, distraction-free search.
With adjustable iron bias, 25 discrimination segments, 5 distinct target tones, and a red LED backlight, the Vanquish 540 Pro Pack gives you the confidence to search any terrain in any lighting.

x-terra-pro.tagline: A PRO-SWITCH-equipped detector that lets you manually select the operating frequency — 5, 8, 10, or 15 kHz — to match the target and soil type, with full IP68 waterproofing to 5 meters, three search modes (Park, Field, Beach) including a dedicated setting for salt-water beaches, plus a built-in flashlight and vibration alert for low-light use.
overviewParagraphs: Take full control of your detecting experience with the Minelab X-Terra Pro, a feature-rich device designed to grow with you. The device is fully waterproof up to 5 meters (16 feet), making it ready to handle wet environments from beaches to shallow streams. Fully customizable audio control and multiple sound modes let you tailor how you hear targets, improving your ability to distinguish valuable finds in challenging ground.

equinox-800.tagline: An advanced evolution of the Equinox 600 that adds a dedicated gold mode (20 and 40 kHz) atop the same simultaneous Multi-IQ platform, with wider iron discrimination control, 8 recovery-speed settings, and bundled wireless headphones — waterproof to 3 meters.
overviewParagraphs: The Equinox 800 is a fully professional detector that combines simultaneous Multi-IQ operation with a dedicated gold mode, making it equally suited to coin, relic, and jewelry hunting and to gold prospecting in mineralized ground.

It offers six single frequencies (4, 5, 10, 15, 20, and 40 kHz) for fine-tuning to specific target types, along with adjustable recovery speed (1 to 8) for clean target separation in trash-dense sites.

The detector is fully waterproof to 3 meters (10 feet) and ships with low-latency aptX Bluetooth headphones and the WM 08 wireless module for fast, clear audio, complemented by an LCD screen with adjustable backlight.

Four search modes — Park, Field, Beach, and Gold — are each available in two customizable profiles (eight in total): Park suits gardens and trash-heavy public areas, Field balances depth and discrimination for farmland and historic sites, Beach uses Multi-IQ to reduce false signals in wet, salty sand, and Gold adds sensitivity for mineralized ground via its 20 and 40 kHz frequencies.

gold-monster-1000.tagline: A gold detector built entirely around automation, combining a 45 kHz VLF frequency with a high-speed 24-bit signal processor for exceptional sensitivity to fine and large gold alike. Fully automatic ground balance, sensitivity, and noise cancellation, two dedicated search-only modes (Gold — ignoring iron, and Deep Metal), and a Gold Chance probability indicator make it an uncomplicated starting point for newcomers to gold prospecting.
overviewParagraphs: The Gold Monster 1000 is an easy-to-use, high-performance gold detector that turns beginners into confident operators through full automation of the most important settings. It pairs a 45 kHz frequency with a 24-bit digital signal processor to boost sensitivity across a wide range of gold piece sizes.

Continuous automatic Easy-Trak ground balance monitors and adjusts the detector as soil conditions change, reducing false signals and maintaining stability in difficult, salt-affected ground without repeated manual intervention.

Improved ferrous/non-ferrous discrimination and stronger performance in conductive (salty) ground compared to higher-frequency detectors make it a strong choice for prospectors seeking to maximize gold recovery across varied ground conditions.

Automatic sensitivity (Auto/Auto+, or 10 manual levels), automatic noise cancel at power-up, and the visual Gold Chance Indicator — which leans toward precious metals like gold and away from iron and hot rocks — round out a feature set built to remove guesswork from every sweep.

excalibur-ii.tagline: A professional dive detector built for underwater searching, fully waterproof to 60 meters and powered by BBS technology that transmits 17 simultaneous frequencies (1.5 to 25.5 kHz) for stable, accurate performance in salt water and mineralized sand. It features a high-visibility phosphorescent housing, two interchangeable shafts (standard for land and a compact dive shaft), and wired integrated headphones — the top choice for shipwreck hunting, beaches, and deep diving.
overviewParagraphs: The Excalibur II stands as Minelab's premier deep-diving detector, built around the exclusive BBS (Broad Band Spectrum) technology that transmits, receives, and analyzes 17 frequencies simultaneously — delivering strong detection depth, high sensitivity, and excellent discrimination across a wide range of target types.

Fully waterproof to 60 meters (200 feet), it is built for professional divers. RCB technology amplifies weak signals within the coil itself, cutting electrical interference and preserving signal strength from deep, faint targets.

The exclusive Iron Mask feature overcomes the masking effect of nearby iron, keeping gold, silver, and coin signals audible even in iron-heavy areas, while a high-visibility phosphorescent housing makes the detector easy to see in low light or murky water.

Control is handled through simple analog dials rather than a display: a Discriminate mode with adjustable rejection, an All-Metal/Pinpoint mode for precise target location, and a dual-shaft design that switches between a standard land shaft and a compact dive configuration.

ctx-3030.tagline: A fully integrated professional detector with a full-color LCD screen and a built-in GPS system (GPSi) that automatically logs find locations and search paths for later review on a computer. FBS 2 multi-frequency technology (1.5 to 100 kHz) and the Smartfind 2 system provide visual ferrous and conductivity discrimination, backed by waterproofing to 3 meters, wireless audio, and portable setting memory via XChange 2 software — built for serious collectors who want to document every find.
overviewParagraphs: The CTX 3030 is Minelab's most advanced all-around detector, pairing multi-frequency FBS 2 technology with Smartfind 2 discrimination for reliable results across every soil type. A full-color LCD screen gives you a clear readout for every target.

The built-in GPSi system logs GeoTrails, WayPoints, and FindPoints with high accuracy, so you can retrace productive ground and return to it later, with data exportable to Google Maps via XChange 2 software.

Wi-Stream wireless audio through the included WM 10 module keeps response instant, and Koss UR30 headphones are included as well. The detector is fully waterproof to 3 meters (10 feet), with a comfortable design that positions battery weight behind the armrest.

Five preset search modes cover 20 customizable discrimination patterns (two per mode), while Target Trace separates multiple overlapping targets — such as iron next to a coin, or a coin against mineralized ground — for greater accuracy in cluttered sites.

gpx-6000.tagline: A professional gold-prospecting detector using GeoSense-PI pulse-induction technology, delivering standout performance across all soil types including heavily mineralized and salty ground. It ships with three coil options (an included 11-inch mono for tight spots and fine gold, an included 14-inch DD for salty ground, and an optional 17-inch mono for wider coverage and larger nuggets), fully automatic ground balancing, a lightweight 2.1 kg carbon-fiber build, up to 8 hours of battery life, and wireless Bluetooth headphones — the strongest option for prospecting in difficult ground.
overviewParagraphs: The GPX 6000 is a pulse-induction (PI) class gold detector built around Minelab's exclusive GeoSense-PI technology, which analyzes and responds to ground signals with exceptional clarity and precision — enabling detection in terrain once considered too difficult to search.

GeoSense-PI rapidly dampens unwanted signals through three overlapping feedback systems, delivering ultra-fast response for every gold target. Automatic ground balance continuously adapts to changing soil during the sweep, with no manual adjustment required.

At just 2.1 kg, with a lightweight carbon-fiber shaft, a streamlined control box, and a U-Flex armrest, it supports longer, more comfortable detecting sessions. Audio comes through the internal speaker or the ML 100 wireless headphones, which use low-latency aptX Bluetooth.

Ground mode switches between Normal and Difficult (the mineralized-ground default), coil mode toggles between EMI Cancel and Conductive Ground Cancel for salty ground, and Quick-Trak ground balance — automatic or fast manual — keeps pace with changing soil, all wrapped in an Easy Expert setup that performs like an expert's from the first power-up.

gpz-7000.tagline: The Minelab GPZ 7000 is Minelab's ultimate flagship gold detector, built on exclusive ZVT (Zero Voltage Transmission) technology that generates highly stable magnetic fields for exceptional sensitivity and up to 40% more depth than the GPX series. Its smart Super-D coil reduces ground interference, while 256-channel noise cancelling, built-in GPS for logging locations, and low-latency wireless audio make it the first choice for professional prospectors working difficult, previously-worked goldfields.
overviewParagraphs: The GPZ 7000 is an ultra-deep, ultra-sensitive gold detector that takes prospecting to the next level with exclusive ZVT technology, generating powerful, continuously stable magnetic fields that boost gold sensitivity even in hot rocks and complex ground.

Its 14×13-inch Super-D coil combines a central transmit coil with two outer receive coils, dramatically reducing magnetic ground interference and lowering ground noise. Combined with 256-channel noise cancelling, it lets you hear the sound of gold without clutter.

Built-in GPS, powered by a u-blox engine, merges location and time data with the detector's settings to create WayPoint, FindPoint, and GeoHunt files compatible with XChange 2. Wireless audio via the WM 12 module, with under 10ms latency, gives you complete freedom of movement.

vanquish-560.tagline: The Minelab Vanquish 560 is the most capable model in the new Vanquish 60 series, using Multi-IQ technology with a larger V12X coil for wider coverage and better depth. It offers 5 target tones, 30 discrimination segments, 4 iron-bias levels, and 10 sensitivity levels, plus full waterproofing to 5 meters, low-latency wireless Bluetooth audio, a backlit red display with flashlight, a vibrating handle, and up to 10 hours of battery life — ideal for advancing detectorists who want professional performance without complexity.
overviewParagraphs: The Vanquish 560 sets the highest standard in the Vanquish 60 series, delivering greater power, precision, and control. It is built on Multi-IQ technology, detecting across multiple frequencies simultaneously for accurate target response and effective recovery across changing ground.

The V12X coil increases ground coverage and sensitivity, while 4 iron-bias levels, 5 target tones, and handle vibration give better support for isolating valuable targets. The unit is fully waterproof to 5 meters (IP68), lightweight, and compact, ready for every terrain.

A monochrome red LED display offers better visibility in low light, paired with low-latency Bluetooth LE audio and up to 10 hours of battery life — a professional detecting tool with intuitive operation and sharp responsiveness.

vanquish-360.tagline: The Minelab Vanquish 360 is a fully automatic, waterproof metal detector that delivers professional performance in a lightweight, compact build. Built on Minelab's proven Multi-IQ technology, it scans multiple frequencies at once for wider ground coverage and better target separation, with Park, Beach, and All Metal search modes, 119 target IDs, six discrimination segments, and full IP68 waterproofing to 5 meters (16 ft).
overviewParagraphs: The Vanquish 360 is Minelab's fully-automated metal detector, built to deliver simplified professional performance in a lightweight, compact design. Multi-IQ technology scans multiple frequencies at the same time, giving you the power of several detectors working together without manually switching frequencies or guessing.

With Park, Beach, and All Metal search modes, the detector adapts easily to different environments, from crowded parks to wide-open fields and challenging beaches. Full IP68 waterproofing to 5 meters keeps it working without interruption in streams, on beaches, and in waterlogged soil.
It comes with an aluminum-and-fiberglass shaft in a balanced S-bend design, and a 10×7 inch Double-D V10X coil, weighing just 1.16 kg for long detecting sessions without fatigue.

sdc-2300.tagline: The Minelab SDC 2300 is a compact gold-prospecting detector using ultra-fast MPF pulse induction technology, with a fully collapsible design (no disassembly required) that folds down to just 40cm for easy backpack carrying. Waterproof to 3 meters for searching directly in riverbeds and on beaches, with automatic ground balance, a dedicated saline-ground mode, and 9 LED indicators showing signal strength and battery level — built to military-grade standards for prospecting the toughest terrain without any assembly.
overviewParagraphs: The SDC 2300 is built on technology used in equipment trusted by armed forces worldwide — a pulse induction (PI) detector engineered for durability in harsh environments. Its unique folding design compresses the unit without disassembly, for quick setup and easy transport.

MPF (Multi Period Fast) technology uses ultra-fast pulse switching between transmit and receive, reducing residual interference during reception and delivering clearer signals and more precise detection of the smallest gold pieces.

Weighing just 2.3 kg and folding down to 40cm for easy transport in a bag, it uses an 8 inch round Monoloop coil that is waterproof to 3 meters, with continuous automatic ground tracking, a dedicated Salt mode for saline environments, and 9 LED indicators showing battery level and response strength.

pro-find-15.tagline: The Minelab PRO-FIND 15 is a target pinpointer, not a full metal detector — it precisely locates a target inside the hole after your primary detector has found it, reducing dig size and speeding up recovery. It uses VLF technology with fixed sensitivity, a tone that intensifies as you approach the target, DIF interference-reduction technology, and is waterproof to 1.5 meters, running on a single 9V battery for up to 30 hours.
overviewParagraphs: The PRO-FIND 15 delivers simple, reliable target pinpointing with fixed sensitivity, a clear intensifying tone response (audio only, with no physical vibration), and precise audio pinpointing. It is lightweight, waterproof to 1.5 meters, easy to use, and dependable in the field.

VLF and DIF technologies work together for smooth, stable operation, helping you pinpoint targets quickly and accurately, even in crowded or highly mineralized environments. VLF technology transmits a steady sine-wave signal for fast detection, while DIF technology prevents signal interference with other nearby detectors.
Its bright yellow handle stands out clearly in dirt, sand, or grass, and it comes with a durable semi-rigid holster that keeps it within reach and ready to use at any moment.

gpz-8000.tagline: Minelab's newest flagship for 2026 and successor to the GPZ 7000, the GPZ 8000 pairs next-generation GeoZVT ground technology with the multi-layered, stereo-separated Echo Sonic Pro sound system and a three-size Z-Set concentric coil range for maximum depth in the toughest ground. A lightweight chassis, Pro-Swing 125 support harness, and dual rechargeable lithium batteries make it Minelab's most powerful gold detector to date.
overviewParagraphs: The GPZ 8000 is Minelab's newest flagship, engineered for advanced performance in the toughest ground. Built on GeoZVT technology — the next generation of the ZVT platform — it takes everything Minelab learned from the GPZ 7000 and GPX 6000 to a new level of advanced ground processing.

The three concentric Z-Set ring coils — Z18 for maximum depth in open ground, Z17 for highly conductive, noisy soil, and Z13 for areas dense with vegetation — are each designed to reduce ground noise according to the terrain.

The Echo Sonic Pro sound system delivers true stereo audio processing, with two separate channels reaching each ear in real time rather than blending down to a single dominant channel, giving you complete control over interpreting target and ground signals. The Pro-Swing 125 harness distributes the detector's weight for longer, more comfortable prospecting sessions.

vanquish-560-pro-pack.tagline: The Vanquish 560 Pro Pack is the top-tier package in Minelab's Vanquish family, pairing proven Multi-IQ multi-frequency technology with a simplified, intuitive design for professional-level performance. It bundles both the wide-coverage V12X coil and the precision-focused V8X coil alongside ML60 wireless headphones, giving you a complete detecting kit ready for any environment.
overviewParagraphs: The Vanquish 560 Pro Pack is the top package in Minelab's Vanquish family, designed for professional performance in a simplified, intuitive design. Multi-IQ technology scans multiple frequencies simultaneously for reliable discrimination and faster target recovery in changing ground conditions.

With 30 discrimination segments, four iron bias levels, and five distinct audio tones, this detector makes it easy to separate junk from treasure in iron-heavy sites. The package includes both the V12X and V8X coils together, giving you the choice of wide coverage or high precision depending on the site.

Wireless ML60 headphones with Bluetooth LE Audio and handle vibration give you fast, clear signal feedback, while a red LED screen and a built-in flashlight maintain visibility in low light. Fully waterproof to IP68 rated to 5 meters, it runs for up to 10 hours continuously.

gold-monster-2000.tagline: The Gold Monster 2000 tracks the finest gold with greater precision in highly mineralized ground, thanks to Minelab's exclusive Multi-Au technology, which combines synchronized multi-frequency VLF sensitivity (12-76 kHz) with a pulse induction ground-processing engine. Echo Wave audio separates faint gold signals from hot rocks and iron trash, while the instant Gold Probability indicator and 0-99 digital target ID speed up dig decisions.
overviewParagraphs: The Gold Monster 2000 is Minelab's newest hybrid gold detector, built for serious prospecting in highly mineralized ground. Multi-Au technology combines synchronized multi-frequency VLF sensitivity (12-76 kHz) with a pulse induction (PI) ground-processing engine, delivering stability in red dirt, black sand, and difficult soils where single-frequency detectors lose their signal.

Echo Wave audio clearly separates faint gold signals from hot rocks and iron, preserving sensitivity and depth. The instant Gold Probability indicator, together with a 0-99 digital target ID, gives you faster and more confident dig decisions.

It comes with a lightweight (1.25 kg) telescopic carbon fiber shaft that folds down to 65 cm, a 5-inch round GM2000-05 Double-D coil waterproof to one meter, and two replaceable lithium-ion batteries.

pro-find-35.tagline: The Pro-Find 35 is a rugged, professional-grade pinpointer built for serious detecting, submersible to 3 meters and equipped with five sensitivity levels, Ferrous Tone ID, and DIF technology for fast, accurate target pinpointing with minimal interference. A built-in LED flashlight, intensifying vibration feedback, and up to 20 hours of runtime make it a practical companion for fieldwork.
overviewParagraphs: The Pro-Find 35 is a rugged pinpointer from Minelab, designed for serious detecting. Submersible to 3 meters (10 feet), it features five sensitivity levels, Ferrous Tone ID, and DIF technology, delivering clear, accurate target response with minimal interference.

VLF and DIF technologies work together to provide smooth, stable operation for fast and precise pinpointing, even in crowded or mineralized environments. VLF transmits a continuous single-frequency wave signal for fast detection even in shallow or variable ground, while DIF reduces unwanted signal noise from nearby detectors.

A built-in LED flashlight illuminates the target area in low light, and vibration feedback intensifies as you get closer to the target, providing clear tactile feedback for precise pinpointing. It runs on a 9V PP3 battery for up to 20 hours and comes with a semi-rigid holster and safety lanyard.

pro-find-40.tagline: Minelab's deepest and most accurate target pinpointer, offering up to 10% greater detection depth than previous models, one-touch Rapid Re-Tune for instant adaptation to changing ground, 5 sensitivity levels with Ferrous Tone ID for audible iron discrimination, vibration and sound feedback that intensify near the target, a built-in LED light, and a high-visibility red handle with a loss alarm — ideal for professionals seeking maximum accuracy and fast target recovery.
overviewParagraphs: The Pro-Find 40 is Minelab's deepest and most accurate target pinpointer, designed for detectorists who demand greater performance. It delivers approximately 10% deeper detection compared to the Pro-Find 35 and is waterproof to 3 meters (10 feet), with five sensitivity levels, Ferrous Tone ID, and DIF technology for a clear, accurate target response with minimal interference.

VLF and DIF technologies work together to deliver cleaner signals and more accurate target pinpointing, even in crowded or heavily mineralized environments. VLF transmits a continuous single-frequency wave signal for fast, reliable detection even in shallow or variable ground, while DIF reduces unwanted signal noise from nearby detectors.

The Pro-Find 40 features Rapid Re-Tune, letting you re-tune the device with a single button press to instantly adapt to changing ground conditions — reducing interference in mineralized or difficult soil and speeding up target recovery.

A built-in LED flashlight illuminates the target area in low light, and vibration feedback intensifies as you approach the target, providing clear tactile feedback that helps with precise pinpointing even underwater. It runs on a 9V PP3 battery for up to 20 hours, and comes with a semi-rigid holster and safety lanyard ready for field use, plus a high-visibility red handle with a Lost Alarm to help you locate it if dropped.

goldxtra-tgx-pro.tagline: GoldXtra TGX Pro is a fully integrated professional detector with five detection systems for gold, precious metals, treasures, voids, and underground cavities.
overviewParagraphs: The GoldXtra TGX Pro combines advanced detection technology with straightforward controls, built for serious treasure hunters. Designed to locate coins, relics, and raw gold, it delivers reliable performance in difficult terrain and highly mineralized soil.

Its dedicated Gold Mode helps you focus on gold signals while reducing unwanted responses, and it's built for exceptional depth on deeply buried targets. Stability in mineralized ground keeps false signals to a minimum, while Detect-All Mode covers a wide range of metals for multi-purpose searching. The expandable IC125 coil opens up to 127 cm for wider ground coverage.

Unmatched depth for serious treasure and deep-target hunting, stability in mineralized ground for improved accuracy, and beginner-friendly controls paired with advanced performance for professional users make the TGX Pro a versatile choice. Accurate target pinpointing saves time during recovery and digging, while a rechargeable battery supports longer search sessions, a backlit display aids low-light use, and a Type-C charging port allows fast, convenient charging.

goldxtra-tgx-pro-plus.tagline: The most fully equipped model in the TGX series, featuring five advanced detection systems for gold, precious metals, treasures, voids, and caves, along with extra accessories and enhanced sensitivity — built for professional prospectors seeking maximum performance.
overviewParagraphs: The GoldXtra TGX Pro Plus is an advanced gold and metal detector built for professional searchers who demand precision, stability, and modern technology. It builds on the proven TGX Pro platform and adds smart features that improve accuracy and ease of use in real field conditions.

One of the TGX Pro Plus's key upgrades is its integration with the GoldXtra smartphone app, giving you real-time monitoring of finds directly from your phone. This smart system helps you interpret targets quickly, reduce unnecessary digging, and focus on valuable discoveries.

Smart app-based detection includes a live target feed shown instantly on your phone, a three-tier graphing system for fast target identification, and a color heat map indicating target size, depth, and metal type. On the detection side, Gold Mode delivers focused gold detection with minimal interference, Detect-All Mode provides sensitive scanning across all metal types, and the device maintains exceptional depth and stability even in difficult mineralized soil.
